title: Appointments
subtitle: Manage and schedule clinic appointments.
noAppointmentsFound: No appointments found for this selection.

calendar.clickDayHint: Click a day to open that daily schedule.

availabilityWarning.title: Practitioner is not available at this time
availabilityWarning.description: The selected appointment time is outside the practitioner's configured availability. Choose another time within their schedule or update availability in Settings > Doctor Availability.

form.overlapError: Overlap detected! Practitioner is busy at this time.
form.helperText: Select the patient, service and practitioner to view available appointment times.
form.selectServiceDurationHint: The service duration will be used automatically after selection.
form.slotPrerequisite: Select a service, practitioner and date to view available times.
form.noSlots: No available time was found for this day.
form.noSlotsSuggestion: No available time was found for this date. Please choose another date.
form.slotError: Available times could not be loaded. Please try again.
form.doctorAvailabilityMissing: No working hours are defined for this practitioner. Define practitioner working hours before creating an available appointment time.
form.clinicClosed: The clinic is closed on this date. Please choose another date.
form.doctorOffDay: The practitioner is off on this date. Please choose another date.
form.noShowRescheduleTitle: Creating a new appointment from a no-show
form.noShowRescheduleBody: This appointment is being recreated from a previous appointment marked as no-show.
form.noShowRescheduleRecoveryHint: When this appointment is created, the previous no-show will automatically be marked as recovered.
form.instagramSourceTitle: Creating from an Instagram DM conversation
form.instagramSourceBody: This appointment is being created from an Instagram DM conversation. When saved, the related DM will be marked as converted.
